raw_output: Gravity, a fundamental force that governs the behavior of objects with mass or energy, can be simply understood by considering an example like a banana being peeled. When you pull apart the layers of a banana, they are attracted to each other and want to come back together due to the force of gravity. This attraction is stronger as we bring them closer together, and becomes weaker as we move them further apart - much like two objects in space that are either pulled towards each other or kept apart by their mutual gravitational interaction. This pull is what keeps our planet orbiting around the sun!
